title: End-to-End PD Serving Simulation — Vidur × NS-3 Two-Phase Co-Sim
summary_zh: 四段式共模擬：Vidur (serving, 事件驅動) × NS-3 (網路, trace 驅動)。Phase 1 buffer KV 傳輸、Phase 2 對完整 trace 跑 NS-3、Phase 3 以 FCT 注入 decode 事件、Phase 4 跑完 decode。在 LLaMA 3 8B / 16 GPU / Zipf 500 request 下，中央控制器相較純 ECMP 減少 23% 平均 KV 傳輸時間、34% p99、16% 平均 TTFT；分析式 size/bw 比真實 NS-3 於 p99 樂觀 13×。
summary_en: Four-phase co-simulation pairing Vidur (event-driven serving) with NS-3 (trace-driven network). Phase 1 buffers KV transfers, Phase 2 runs NS-3 on the full trace, Phase 3 injects decode events at prefill_end+FCT, Phase 4 drains decode. Under LLaMA 3 8B / 16 GPUs / Zipf 500 requests, the centralized controller cuts mean KV transfer time by 23%, p99 by 34%, and mean TTFT by 16% vs ECMP; the analytic size/bw formula is 13× optimistic vs real NS-3 at p99.
